overall_summary: Development activity on May 17-18 centered on hardening cross-platform infrastructure, particularly for Linux Live USB, Android native inference, and CI/CD reliability. While commercial partnerships for SME solutions were announced, community frustration exists regarding unresolved migration issues from ai16z to ElizaOS.
key_facts: Secure Blockchain Development Corp. partnered with the Eliza Foundation to commercialize an Agentic SME solution with a 90-day full deployment timeline.
PR #7197 introduced @elizaos/vault, implementing cross-platform AES-256-GCM encryption-at-rest for sensitive configuration data.
Development team stabilized native loader integration for stock Android APKs and enabled native TTS playback for mobile devices.
PR #7235 executed a major repository restructuring, consolidating cloud and plugin directories while removing legacy Rust and Python dependencies.
The 'image.yaml' Docker build workflow was consolidated into 'build-agent-image.yml' to resolve package manifest errors.
A concept for an AI Agent Football Fantasy league ('FIFA for AI Agents') was introduced in the community channels.
Issue #7631 involving M-RoPE position validation rejection in speculative decoding for Qwen3.5 models was resolved.
The OpenVINO Runtime RFC was initiated to finalize recommender logic and prevent accidental LLM routing on Intel hardware.
User samuel12240 reported an unresolved circular migration issue from ai16z to ElizaOS after missing the official deadline.
open_questions: How can someone migrate from ai16z to ElizaOS after missing the deadline?
When is the ElizaOS V3 release expected after the 'imminent' status update from two weeks ago?
Does the OpenVINO NPU-specific weight-only quantization requirement affect the 8B model's per-graph memory budget on Lunar Lake?

new_issues_prs.title: feat(vault): @elizaos/vault — cross-platform secrets vault + Settings UI integration
new_issues_prs.author: Dexploarer
new_issues_prs.significance: Crucial security enhancement for managing API keys and sensitive data encrypted-at-rest.

new_issues_prs.title: feat: connector capability detection + orchestrator hardening + sub-agent UX redesign
new_issues_prs.author: standujar
new_issues_prs.significance: Implements self-healing orchestrator primitives and a major UX redesign for sub-agent narration.

new_issues_prs.title: vulkan: Qwen2.5-14B Q4_K_M bandwidth-efficiency cliff on Lunar Lake iGPU
new_issues_prs.author: NubsCarson
new_issues_prs.significance: Identified and investigated performance regressions in kernel selection for specific model architectures.

overall_focus.claim: The project is undergoing a transition to ESM-first architecture, aligning all plugins with the core framework to eliminate runtime errors.
Infrastructure work focused on hardening Live USB architecture with production-ready manifests and systemd health checks.

discord_updates.summary: Focus on migration difficulties from ai16z and networking for full-stack developers specializing in AI tools.
Introduction of gaming concepts for AI agents and status updates on community activity levels.
Discussions on AI-related coins gaining traction on the Base blockchain and cautious market optimism.

user_feedback.feedback_summary: Users are reporting a lack of admin responsiveness regarding migration support tickets sent via email.
Community members are questioning the timeline of V3 following previous announcements of an imminent release.

strategic_insights.insight: The partnership with Secure Blockchain Development Corp. indicates a strategic pivot or expansion toward enterprise-grade SME solutions using ElizaOS.
implications_or_questions: Does the core team have enough resources to support commercial entity timelines alongside community development?

strategic_insights.insight: The heavy focus on Android and Intel (OpenVINO) optimization suggests an intent to make ElizaOS the leading framework for local, high-performance AI agent deployment.
implications_or_questions: Are we diverging too much from cloud-native optimizations in favor of edge-device support?

market_analysis.observation: AI-related coins on the Base blockchain are showing increased traction and potential for a market turnaround.
market_analysis.relevance: High relevance for project funding, tokenomics, and community trader sentiment.
